name: Zhou Yu

skills.name: Blaze
skills.description: Damage from Basic Attacks and skills apply marks to enemy units andstructures. At 4 stacks, targets are slowed and suffer damage over time.

skills.name: Wildfire
skills.description: Invokes a wind domain in the target direction, slowing and knocking back enemies in range. Nearby teammates gain Move Speed, and his nearby fires will spread in the direction of the wind.

skills.name: Scorching Bolt
skills.description: Creates a fire domain at the target location that deals burning damage toenemies in it. There can be up to 5 fire domains at a time. He recovers Health over time while in a fire domain. Can stock up to 3 charges of this skill.

skills.name: Flames of War
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in range. lf there's a fire zone in range, any enemies within it will be stunned and take extra damage.

tips: Zhou Yu is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.2% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Mask of Agony → Boots of Tranquility → Frozen Breath → Insatiable Tome → Augur's Word → Venomous Staff.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Zhou Yu's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Wildfire → Scorching Bolt → Flames of War → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Zhou Yu excels into Cirrus, Nakoruru, Xuance. Avoid blind picking into Augran, Cao Cao, Dian Wei without team peel.
Zhou Yu sits at Tier B globally (51.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Zhou Yu good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Zhou Yu is Tier B Mage with 51.2% win rate, 0.5% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Zhou Yu build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Mask of Agony, Boots of Tranquility, Frozen Breath, Insatiable Tome, Augur's Word, Venomous Staff. Run Nightmare arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Zhou Yu?
faqs.answer: Pick Augran, Cao Cao, Dian Wei into Zhou Yu. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Zhou Yu completes core items. Zhou Yu struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Zhou Yu counter?
faqs.answer: Zhou Yu is strong into Cirrus, Nakoruru, Xuance according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Zhou Yu when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Zhou Yu good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Zhou Yu sits at Tier B globally (51.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Zhou Yu play?
faqs.answer: Zhou Yu is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Zhou Yu?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Zhou Yu or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Zhou Yu vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Zhou Yu has +0.1% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Zhou Yu when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Zhou Yu?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Mage picks unless targeting a one-trick.
